baseline.name: GME January 2021
baseline.source: SEC Staff Report on Equity and Options Market Structure Conditions in Early 2021
baseline.short_market_cap_note: Short notional / market cap is approximated as shares sold short / shares outstanding when measured at the same share price. SEC staff reported GME short interest exceeded shares outstanding in January 2021, with a cited 109.26% high on December 31, 2020; SEC also reported 122.97% of float in January 2021.

gme_2021_case.price_source: yfinance GME daily close, split-adjusted by Yahoo where applicable; normalized to the COVID-era closing low in this window
gme_2021_case.jan_2021_gain_source: CNBC recap of January 2021 GME move
gme_2021_case.short_market_cap_note: Short notional / market cap is approximated as shares sold short / shares outstanding when measured at the same share price. SEC staff reported GME short interest exceeded shares outstanding in January 2021, with a cited 109.26% high on December 31, 2020; SEC also reported 122.97% of float in January 2021.
gme_2021_case.sec_volume_note: SEC staff described Jan. 13-29, 2021 average GME trading volume as roughly 100 million shares per day, more than 1,400% above the 2020 average.

social_benchmark.note: External social-listening benchmark, not the same methodology as the current ApeWisdom 24h WSB ranking.

gme_2021_case.methodology_note: Price is normalized to GME's COVID-era closing low in this window. The historical social benchmark is not directly comparable to the current ApeWisdom WSB 24h count; it shows order-of-magnitude attention during the GME event.

finra_short_volume.source: FINRA Reg SHO Daily Short Sale Volume

short_deep_dive.caveat: Short Interest Shares is the open short-position stock reported on FINRA settlement dates. Daily Short Sale Volume Ratio is same-day reported short-sale flow, not accumulated open short interest. Short / Market Cap is short shares times price divided by market cap.

score.label: low similarity
score.verdict_ko: 현재는 GME 2021과의 구조적 유사성이 낮습니다. 숏 압력이 GME 2021의 극단적 기준에는 못 미침; 소셜 결집 신호가 아직 제한적; 명확한 단일 인플루언서 집중도 약함.

finra_short_volume.source: FINRA Reg SHO Daily Short Sale Volume

short_deep_dive.caveat: Short Interest Shares is the open short-position stock reported on FINRA settlement dates. Daily Short Sale Volume Ratio is same-day reported short-sale flow, not accumulated open short interest. Short / Market Cap is short shares times price divided by market cap.

score.label: low similarity
score.verdict_ko: 현재는 GME 2021과의 구조적 유사성이 낮습니다. 숏 압력이 GME 2021의 극단적 기준에는 못 미침; 소셜 결집 신호가 아직 제한적; 명확한 단일 인플루언서 집중도 약함.

wsb_trending.source: ApeWisdom wallstreetbets ranking + local Reddit BoW sentiment split
wsb_trending.methodology: Rank by 24h r/wallstreetbets mention volume. Sentiment split uses a local rules-based bag-of-words classifier on recent WSB posts/comments when Reddit OAuth credentials are available; otherwise mentions are shown as neutral.

items.name: Collaborative Investment Series Trust - The SPAC and New Issue ETF

meta.disclaimer: Research automation only. Not investment advice.

spce.classification: High short interest, but below the current top-100 extreme short-float bucket.

short_exposure_context.methodology: SPCE short / market cap uses FINRA shares short divided by shares outstanding proxy. External high-short list uses short percent of float, so it is directional context rather than the same denominator.

comparison.headline: 현재는 GME 2021과의 구조적 유사성이 낮습니다. 숏 압력이 GME 2021의 극단적 기준에는 못 미침; 소셜 결집 신호가 아직 제한적; 명확한 단일 인플루언서 집중도 약함.
